name: What happens if my Phoenix firm gets cited wrong by AI tools?

mainEntity.name: What happens if my Phoenix firm gets cited wrong by AI tools?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Contact AI providers and issue corrections via updated schema/content.** Monitor sentiment; strong E-E-A-T overrides errors over time.[3][6]

Rare but possible; optimized sites self-correct as models retrain.[3]

**Key Factors:**
- Citation tracking tools spot issues.[3]
- Fresh authoritative signals fix fast.[1]
- Brand consistency across web.

**Practical Guidance:** Set AI alerts, push verified bios/schema, engage on platforms. Document for liability.

Proactive monitoring prevents damage.
